benefits.description: Reta was working for weight/fat loss

side_effects.description: Has to eat twice as much food to avoid fatigue and low blood sugar
Insomnia mentioned alongside fatigue and low blood sugar
Looked puffier due to needing to eat carbs; dislikes carb-induced water retention/puffiness

protocol_notes: Finds Reta effective for fat loss but dislikes having to eat significant carbohydrates to manage fatigue/blood sugar, as it causes perceived puffiness from water retention.
